description_long: This is a charming two-story cafe named 'Café de Paris', featuring a brick facade with stone accents and a red-tiled gable roof. The front is adorned with a striped awning above the entrance and outdoor seating, including round tables and chairs on a cobblestone patio. Lush greenery, such as potted topiary and window flower boxes, adds a welcoming touch. One side wall is decorated with a large, colorful mural of a woman's face, giving the building a vibrant, artistic flair. The rear and one side of the building are plain brick, with no windows or doors visible. A small fountain and additional potted plants enhance the inviting atmosphere of the outdoor area.
description: A two-story brick cafe with a red-tiled roof, striped awning, outdoor seating, and a vibrant mural on one side. The facade features lush greenery and a welcoming cobblestone patio.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brick wall, window with flower box, climbing greenery, and potted topiary near the entrance.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Café de Paris' sign, striped awning, outdoor tables and chairs, potted plants, and a small fountain.
description_view_2: Side view dominated by a large, colorful mural of a woman's face, with part of the awning and outdoor seating visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain brick wall with no windows or doors, and a tiled roof.
